## What & why

Briefly: what does this change, and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (engine/script unit tests + structural checks)
- [ ] Added/updated a test for engine or script changes where practical
- [ ] No private data, internal endpoints, or credentials in the diff
- [ ] Renderer changes still go through the `DataSource` abstraction (no direct FS access from the UI)
- [ ] Updated docs (`README` / `CHANGELOG`) if behavior changed
